title: Carry out minor adjustments to outdoor power equipment
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Carry out minor adjustments to outdoor power equipment demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to inspect and adjust outdoor power equipment

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify required information for inspection and adjustment activity1.3 Identify hazards and manage risks associated with the work1.4 Select tools, equipment and materials and check for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify required information for inspection and adjustment activity1.3 Identify hazards and manage risks associated with the work1.4 Select tools, equipment and materials and check for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify required information for inspection and adjustment activity1.3 Identify hazards and manage risks associated with the work1.4 Select tools, equipment and materials and check for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to inspect and adjust outdoor power equipment

elements.title: Inspect outdoor power equipment

pcs.text: Inspect outdoor power equipment according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety requirements2.2 Compare inspection results with manufacturer specifications2.3 Report inspection findings according to workplace procedures, and recommendations for necessary repairs or adjustments2.4 Obtain authorisation to proceed with service and repair in line with recommendations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect outdoor power equipment according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety requirements2.2 Compare inspection results with manufacturer specifications2.3 Report inspection findings according to workplace procedures, and recommendations for necessary repairs or adjustments2.4 Obtain authorisation to proceed with service and repair in line with recommendations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect outdoor power equipment according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety requirements2.2 Compare inspection results with manufacturer specifications2.3 Report inspection findings according to workplace procedures, and recommendations for necessary repairs or adjustments2.4 Obtain authorisation to proceed with service and repair in line with recommendations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Inspect outdoor power equipment

elements.title: Carry out minor adjustments

pcs.text: Select adjusting tools and equipment according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures 3.2 Carry out minor adjustments on outdoor power equipment according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems3.3 Carry out post-adjustment testing according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select adjusting tools and equipment according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures 3.2 Carry out minor adjustments on outdoor power equipment according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems3.3 Carry out post-adjustment testing according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select adjusting tools and equipment according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures 3.2 Carry out minor adjustments on outdoor power equipment according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems3.3 Carry out post-adjustment testing according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm equipment is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
